name: timburr
flavor_texts: It fights by swinging a piece of lumber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty.
These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs.
Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs.
It loves helping out with construction projects. It loves it so much that if rain causes work to halt, it swings its log around and throws a tantrum.
Timburr that have started carrying logs that are about three times their size are nearly ready to evolve.
text: Timburr is the Muscular Pokémon. It is a fighting-type Pokémon. Abilities: guts, sheer-force, iron-fist (hidden). Base stats — HP: 75, Attack: 80, Defense: 55, Sp. Atk: 25, Sp. Def: 35, Speed: 35. Evolution line: timburr → gurdurr → conkeldurr. Lore: It fights by swinging a piece of lumber around. It is close to evolving when it can handle the lumber without difficulty. These Pokémon appear at building sites and help out with construction. They always carry squared logs. Always carrying squared logs, they help out with construction. As they grow, they carry bigger logs. It loves helping out with construction projects. It loves it so much that if rain causes work to halt, it swings its log around and throws a tantrum. Timburr that have started carrying logs that are about three times their size are nearly ready to evolve.
